_doc: Per-page data and slot requirements for the Meiosis Atlas. Round 1 (2026-05-15) ships labels + _doc + _products mapping only; requires_layers / requires_operations / requires_slots / preloads stay empty until the registered meiosis_atlas products are actually being produced. Pages are organised by biological event class (NCO / crossovers / interchromosomal), each folding in one or more registered products. Source of truth for product registration: atlas-core/toolkit_registries/relatedness/01_registry/atlases.jsonl + products.jsonl + questions.jsonl.

nco._doc: Gene-conversion tracts from ngsTracts: classes NCO (short, anywhere), MOSAIC_SHORT (50–200 kb inside inversions — primary signal), MOSAIC_LONG (suspicious long-span with matching flanks). Views: per-dyad counts, tract-length distribution, per-chromosome rate, inside-vs-outside-inversion enrichment.
nco._status_note: ngsTracts NCO outputs are not yet registered as a meiosis_atlas product — registration TBD once real-data run produces the table.

crossovers._doc: Single and double crossovers per dyad and chromosome. Views: per-dyad raw count, rate per Mb, refined breakpoint positions (STEP_TRC_02 traversal_breakpoints.tsv), karyotype-stratified rate to test intrachromosomal inversion-on-meiosis effects.
crossovers._status_note: chromosome_meiosis_events.v1 has partial coverage (14/29 chroms per registry); inversion_meiosis_effects.v1 has no builder yet.

interchromosomal._label: interchromosomal — focal inversion → meiosis on OTHER chromosomes (HEADLINE)
interchromosomal._doc: For each focal inversion, test whether heterozygous parents show altered CO rate, DCO rate, or coefficient of coincidence (C) on chromosomes other than the inversion's own. Family-aware permutation null + local-inversion covariates. The atlas's manuscript-grade headline.
interchromosomal._status_note: Three of four products have no builder yet (coincidence_matrix, local_inv_controls, family_aware_permutation_design — all 'missing' per registry).

crossovers_per_candidate._label: crossovers — per-inversion-candidate ideogram, telomere bias, optional PRDM9 logo
crossovers_per_candidate._doc: Migrated 2026-05-19 from genome-atlas page11. Three views over the recombination map around one inversion candidate at a time: sex-specific CO ideogram (red♀ / blue♂), CO rate vs. relative telomere distance (LOESS + 95% CI band per sex), optional PRDM9 sequence logo (auto-hidden when prdm9_motif.pwm absent). Keyed by shared.candidate; renderer fetches data/crossovers/<candidate_id>.json. Cohort-level CO/DCO view lives on the sibling `crossovers` page.
crossovers_per_candidate._migration_note_2026_05_19: Moved out of genome-atlas because per-candidate CO views are meiosis content, not genome-assembly content. The Genome Atlas's page3 (chromosome overview) CO-density sub-track is a cross-atlas read of meiosis-atlas's crossover_track layer.

nco_per_candidate._label: NCO / gene conversion — per-inversion-candidate tract ideogram + tract-rate telomere bias
nco_per_candidate._doc: Migrated 2026-05-19 from genome-atlas page12. Sister to crossovers_per_candidate, same candidate keying. Two views: tract ideogram (green NCO ticks left, yellow GC ticks right, candidate span as translucent band) and tract rate vs. relative telomere distance (LOESS curve + 95% CI band per kind). Keyed by shared.candidate; renderer fetches data/nco_gc/<candidate_id>.json. Cohort-level NCO view lives on the sibling `nco` page.
nco_per_candidate._migration_note_2026_05_19: Moved out of genome-atlas alongside crossovers_per_candidate.
